data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Tom Lee: Rising activity on the Ethereum chain may build momentum for the year-end market; 2. Paxos releases PYUSD forensic report: Total circulation exceeds 2.6 billion, a record high, up approximately 125.5% from August; 3. A certain address profited 760% in less than two days by trading PING; 4. Total open interest in GIGGLE contracts across the network exceeded $100 million, a record high; 5. CZ: Kyrgyzstan's national stablecoin and CBDC have been launched on BNB Chain, and the national cryptocurrency reserve includes BNB; 6. Ferrari plans to launch the digital token "Token Ferrari 499P"; 7. Glassnode: The reduction in BTC holdings by "Diamond Hand" has created greater resistance to price increases, and current bargain-hunting funds have failed to generate sufficient demand to absorb the selling pressure; 8. Yuga Labs announced that the metaverse Otherside will be launched on November 12; 9. Ethereum treasury company ETHZilla disclosed that its ETH holdings have increased to 102,916 coins, and will release its Q3 financial report on November 14.

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-and-china-may-only-reach-a-tactical-floor/

data.title: Breaking: BlackRock, Fidelity Expand Bitcoin Holdings, Buy Worth $90,600,000
data.description:

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/25/breaking-blackrock-fidelity-expand-bitcoin-holdings-buy-worth-90600000/

data.title: U.S. and China hold talks to stop trade war from getting worse
data.description:
Senior officials from America and China sat down for crucial discussions in Malaysia’s capital on Saturday, hoping to prevent their trade dispute from escalating and ensure that the two presidents can meet face-to-face next week. American Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Trade Representative Jamieson Greer met with China’s Vice Premier He Lifeng and trade negotiator […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-china-to-stop-trade-war-getting-worse/

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs surge ahead as Ethereum ETFs suffer persistent outflows
data.description:
Bitcoin ETFs recorded net inflows of $90. 6 billion on Friday, compared to Ethereum ETFs, which recorded outflows of $93. 6 billion.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-etfs-surge-ahead-eth-etf-suffer/

data.title: Ferrari plans to launch digital token 'Token Ferrari 499P'
data.description: Ferrari, a world-renowned racing and sports car brand, announced plans to launch a digital token, "Token Ferrari 499P," which will allow fans to bid for the Le Mans endurance race-winning Ferrari 499P. The token will be available to Hyperclub members, and holders will be able to trade with each other and participate in exclusive auctions. (Reuters)

data.description:
Malaysia is trying really hard to keep made for America chips free of tariffs in efforts to appease the Trump administration as it prepares to close a trade deal with them this Sunday, according to Bloomberg. Malaysia’s Investment, Trade and Industry Minister Zafrul Aziz said, “It’s zero for now and I hope it continues to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/malaysia-mulls-zero%e2%80%91tariff-on-u-s-chips/

data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/france-2026-deficit-ceiling-at-4-8-of-gdp/

data.title: CZ: Kyrgyzstan's national stablecoin and CBDC are now online on BNB Chain, and the national cryptocurrency reserves include BNB
data.description: Binance founder CZ announced in a post that Kyrgyzstan's national stablecoin has been listed on BNB Chain, and the central bank digital currency (CBDC) is ready for launch, intended for use in government-related payments and other scenarios. Furthermore, Kyrgyzstan has established a national cryptocurrency reserve, including BNB. He added that Binance has conducted local law enforcement training and partnered with 10 top universities to launch Binance Academy courses. The Binance app has also been localized in Kyrgyz. A recent offline event in the capital, Bishkek, attracted over a thousand participants. CZ also mentioned that Sign has partnered with Kyrgyzstan, with Yzi Labs as one of its minority investors.

data.title: The total open interest of GIGGLE contracts on the entire network exceeded US$100 million, setting a new record high.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that the total holdings of GIGGLE contracts across the entire network have reached 515,000, and the holding scale has exceeded US$100 million. It is currently reported at US$110 million, setting a historical high and a 24-hour increase of 254.35%. Among them, Binance GIGGLE contract holdings are 303,900 (US$65.6161 million), with a 24-hour increase of 265.76%; Bybit's GIGGLE contract holdings are 60,500 (US$13.0661 million), with a 24-hour increase of 209.04%.
